channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Toei Company establishes Toei Games
item.content:encoded:
First game to be announced on April 24.

Toei Company has announced the establishment of Toei Games, an in-house games publishing brand. It plans to launch games primarily for PC via Steam in 2026, with plans to expand to consoles such as PlayStation, Xbox, and Switch. Its goal is to “create a new intellectual property that will captivate the world, starting with games.”

Toei Games’ initial lineup of titles, which will be announced at a later date, will not use Toei’s existing intellectual properties. Instead, they will be completely new properties made by creators from Japan and abroad.

The first title under the Toei Games brand will be announced on April 24.

The logo for Toei Games was designed by Kairosoft, which also created a pixel animation version of the “Waves on the Rough Shore” opening sequence that has become synonymous with Toei films.

Here are statements from Toei and Kairosoft on the brand’s establishment:

Statement from President and CEO, Fumio Yoshimura

“Toei Company, Ltd. has launched a new game brand, “Toei Games,” and is venturing into the new field of the game business. We intend to clearly position this business as a “new pillar” alongside the fields that have been Toei’s mainstays such as movies, television, and events.

“Games are an extremely global form of entertainment that continues to spread beyond language and national borders. Our group’s medium- to long-term vision, ‘Toei New Wave 2033,’ aims to deliver the “stories” created by Toei to the entire world. We believe that our challenge in the game business, with the global market as our main battleground, is the embodiment of that vision.

“Toei Games aims to create entirely new IPs from scratch, rather than simply utilizing existing IPs. We will leverage the technology and expertise we have cultivated through video production into our new game business, delivering Toei’s unique entertainment experience to players around the world.

“Please look forward to Toei’s new challenge.”

Comment from Kairo-kun, CEO and closing officer of Kairosoft Co., Ltd.

“I had a dream that I would start having sleepless nights from the day I was given the important task of creating a logo.

“What kind of logo would be suitable for the gaming industry, which is tossed about by rough waves while you’re in bed…? Zzz.

“With the refreshing spring weather upon us, the logo celebrating this new beginning has been completed. Yay!”

Visit the Toei Games official website here.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/toei-company-establishes-toei-games
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: and Roger coming to Switch 2, iOS, and Android on June 18
item.content:encoded:
• Smartphone
  • Switch 2

Currently available for Switch and PC.

Publisher Kodansha and developer TearyHand Studio will release short interactive novel game and Roger for Switch 2, iOS, and Android on June 18, the companies announced.

and Roger first launched for Switch and PC via Steam on July 24, 2025.

An update due out at the same time as the new versions will add support for 20 new languages—Portuguese (Brazil, Portugal), Spanish (Latin America), Ukrainian, Thai, Polish, Russian, Danish, Swedish, Czech, Dutch, Finnish, Norwegian, Hungarian, Romanian, Vietnamese, Indonesian, Turkish, Bulgarian, and Greek.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

and Roger is an interactive novel that lets you see through the protagonist’s eyes—whether what she sees makes sense or not. It is comprised of three chapters and can be played in its entirety in about one hour.

Story

It’s just another morning for this young girl. She wakes up and starts getting herself ready while shaking off the sleepiness like always. Except something, somehow, feels off.

When she steps into the living room, she expects to find her dad preparing for work. Instead, she finds a stranger sleeping on the couch.

The man wakes up, looks at the girl, and sighs. Ignoring her confusion, he mumbles to himself with a hint of sadness in his voice.

Scared, the girl runs. She must leave the house.

She doesn’t know who this man is or where her father has gone.

Walk alongside her on this twisting, twisted path and see where it will lead her.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/and-roger-coming-to-switch-2-ios-and-android-on-june-18
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Sanrio Party Land announced for Switch 2, Switch
item.content:encoded:
• Switch
  • Switch 2

Sanrio establishes games publishing label Sanrio Games.

Sanrio Games, a new games publishing brand established by Hello Kitty intellectual property owner Sanrio, has announced Sanrio Party Land, a party game coming to Switch 2 and Switch this fall worldwide.

Set in a town of many Sanrio characters, the game allows users to create their own avatar and play mini-games and board games together. Further information about the game will be announced at a later date.

In addition to Sanrio Party land, Sanrio Games plans to release another title this fiscal year, and approximately 10 titles by March 2029.

Here is an overview of the brand, via its official website:

Background Behind the Launch of the Game Brand

Guided by its founding philosophy of Minna Nakayoku (or “Getting Along Together”), Sanrio has created more than 450 character IPs, including Hello Kitty. In May 2025, Sanrio announced its long-term vision, “A lighthouse guiding everyone to smiles,” and set out to evolve into a global IP platformer. One of the core pillars supporting this vision is its game business.

To date, many games featuring Sanrio characters have been released globally through licensing partnerships. While Sanrio will continue to expand these initiatives, it is also launching a self-published game brand as a new way to connect its IP directly with customers around the world, further broadening and enriching its entertainment experiences.

The World of Sanrio Games

Under the Sanrio Games brand, Sanrio will take a leading role in planning and development as it enters the global gaming market.

Through self-publishing, Sanrio will strategically design a diverse range of game experiences, from titles featuring a wide variety of characters to games that deeply reflect each character’s unique world, as well as projects across multiple genres. Looking ahead, Sanrio will also explore the creation of new IP originating from games, expanding its IP universe with gaming at its core.

In addition, by linking games with Sanrio’s existing services, such as its membership program Sanrio+, retail shops, and theme parks, Sanrio will create new forms of entertainment value and experiences.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/sanrio-party-land-announced-for-switch-2-switch
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Dialoop coming to Switch on June 17
item.content:encoded:
• Switch

Currently available for PC.

Byking will release a Switch version of roguelite match-three puzzle adventure game Dialoop on June 17, the developer announced.

Dialoop first launched in Early Access for PC via Steam on December 8, 2025, followed by a full release today.

Here is an overview of the game, via Byking:

About

Dialoop is a roguelite match-three puzzle adventure where players match same-colored blocks and create combos to damage and ultimately defeat enemies within a set number of turns. Along their adventures players pick from a variety of characters, each with their own unique abilities, and purchase relics which will offer a diverse range of strategies as they work through their journey

Dialoop Version 1.0 Update Changes

The version 1.0 update for Dialoop will contain three additional characters previously locked in Early Access including Volkov, Eric, and Shogun Nobu. Each playable character features unique skills along with a wealth of story content.

Relish the Relics

Over 160 relics across solo and PVP multiplayer modes will be available. Each successful run at a level earns a visit to the shop where players can buy one of the available relics. Purchase relics that compliment character abilities and overall gameplay style to gain the upper hand. Strategize for taking out difficult bosses in Adventure mode or decimate the opposition in Battle Royale.

Additional Surprises

Three mini-games have been secretly added to Dialoop‘s Early Access version and will be present in the 1.0 version. Inputting special commands on the main menu will allow access to unlock the mini-games in the settings menu. Where could these special commands be hidden in the game?

Watch a new trailer below.

Switch Announce Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/dialoop-coming-to-switch-on-june-17
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Shikhondo: Blue Pieta debut trailer
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2

Fantasy bullet hell shoot 'em up due out on May 18.

Publisher CFK and developer DeerFarm have released the debut trailer for fantasy bullet hell shoot ’em up game Shikhondo: Blue Pieta.

Here is an overview of the game, via CFK:

About

Shikhondo: Blue Pieta is a side-scrolling fantasy bullet hell—a series first. It follows Shikhondo: Youkai Rampage (Steam: April 2024, Nintendo Switch: May 2025), moving the stage to a foreign city where a rookie grim reaper and a vampire hunter cross paths.

Full voice acting throughout. Ultra-wide support up to 32:9.

What’s New

The series goes side-scrolling for the first time. The stages—a metropolis, an amusement park, a subway station—are modern spaces that feel lived-in and slightly off. The enemies come from the legends of a different world.

The Soul Collect system returns, evolved. Graze bullets to charge your gauge. Trigger it: every bullet on screen becomes a score pickup, 2x multiplier. Have a bomb left? Spend it for a second stage—4x multiplier, attacks boosted. The closer you play to the edge, the more you get out of it.

Counter Bomb is new to the series. Get hit, and the screen flashes—eight frames to press the bomb button. Do it in time: no damage, and you either pop Soul Collect Mode or burn a bomb. Near-death is a decision now.

Counter Bomb requires a full Soul Gauge or at least one available bomb.

Shikhondo: Blue Pieta is due out for PC via Steam and Stove on May 18, followed by PlayStation 5, Switch 2, and Switch at a later date.

Watch the trailer below.

Official Trailer

English

Japanese

Korean



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/shikhondo-blue-pieta-debut-trailer
